message:
fix(node): length-prefix content_hash in build_registry_seed_request

Replace colon-delimited format!("{name}:{version}:content") with
length-prefixed encoding to prevent hash collision when name or version
contains colons. The attestation_hash in the same function already used
length-prefixed encoding; this aligns content_hash to the same pattern.

Closes: bd-11eg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
